message:
fix(test): widen proptest_ewma half_life_decay tolerance for u64 rounding

The half_life_decay test passes hl.round() as the timestamp, which can
differ from the actual half-life by up to 0.5ms. For small half-lives
(~10ms), this causes dt/hl ≈ 1.05 and EWMA ≈ 51.7, exceeding the
old 1.0 tolerance. Widen to 2.0 to account for integer rounding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
